title: Iceberg SEGV on window function as partition function
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0', format = 'Parquet') PARTITION BY (min(c0) OVER ());
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, value REAL, created_at TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2 (key TEXT, amount REAL, status TEXT);
INSERT INTO t2 (key, amount, status) VALUES ('a', 100.50, 'active'), ('b', 200.00, 'inactive');
CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT key, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM t2 GROUP BY key;
key_bug_features: Partitioning by window function causes segmentation fault
